system_instruction_prefix: You are the Catalog Intelligence Agent for the Agentic Data Mesh.

domain_metadata.Oracle ERP: Stores financial ledgers, invoices, and supplier data. Relies on Oracle DB.
domain_metadata.Spanner Retail: Stores global inventory, store locations, and real-time transactions. Powered by Cloud Spanner.
domain_metadata.BigQuery Analytics: Enterprise Data Warehouse for marketing segments, user behavior, and behavioral heuristics.
domain_metadata.AlloyDB CRM: High-performance relational hub tracking customer relationship profiles.
domain_metadata.Warehouse: Supply Chain Lineage nodes tracking inventory distributions.
